title: Resource Items
description: See all available CIT renaming options for your items, from your resource packs!
body:
Let me introduce you the most useful mod for RolePlay experiece...
# Resoruce Items!₍₍⚞(ˆᗜˆ)⚟⁾⁾

This simple client-side mod adds a easy-to-use way to rename items with all your resoursepacks!
It give you **every avaible name options** requared for new look on your items, and I mean **every**! (o^<)

All you need to do is just place your item in slot, press new **button**, select **Item Model** and select prefered **Name Key**! It's **THAT EASY!**

## ...but I will give you visual instruction anyway! ( ദ്ദി ˙ᗜ˙ )
| Open Anvil GUI and Place an Item | Press THE "?" BUTTON |
|----------------------------------|----------------------|
|![Open Anvil GUI and Place an Item](https://i.imgur.com/jY1hAvX.gif)|![Press THE "?" BUTTON](https://i.imgur.com/nCN55Bz.gif)

| Choose Item Model you want on item | Choose prefered Item Key |
|------------------------------------|--------------------------|
|![Choose Item Model you want on item](https://i.imgur.com/6FNcgLC.gif)|![Choose prefered Item Key](https://i.imgur.com/jwCQrUD.gif)|


Also featuring **2 Creative Inventory Tabs** - first for **Renames**, and second for **"Items"** folder from your resource packs!

Resource Pack used for demonstration - [KSEPSP](https://definitelyawhale.github.io/ksepsp_website/)₊˚⊹♡\

## Recommended mods for better expirience
[RPF](https://modrinth.com/mod/rpf) - merges 2 or more Resource Packs with item model definitions\
[RP renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) - when it come out to 1.21.11 just use this mod instead of this, mine is just a temporary secret brother deltarune chapter 5
